LanguageData.OH_CommandSpawnShipAIDesc: Materialise the gravship's holographic assistant beside this console.
LanguageData.OH_CommandSpawnShipAI_NoPawnKind: No ship AI pawn kind is configured.
LanguageData.OH_CommandSpawnShipAI_NoMap: The console must be built before projecting the ship AI.
LanguageData.OH_CommandSpawnShipAI_AlreadySpawned: The ship AI has already been projected from this console.
LanguageData.OH_CommandSpawnShipAI_AlreadyPresent: A ship AI is already active on this map.
LanguageData.OH_CommandSpawnShipAI_NoSpace: No clear space is available to project the ship AI.
